क* गई। MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th September, 2015 S.O.,2453(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of section 12 and section 13 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) read with rule 10 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 1174(E), dated the 18th July, 2007, namely :- 2.
